assertions.title: Dispatch preview and confirmation surface readiness, GST context, and shipment outcomes

steps.expected: Dispatch page loads with pending dispatches list
steps.observed: Dispatch page loaded but showed 'Unable to load pending dispatches' error
API call made correctly but returned no confirmed orders
Retry triggered but still no data available

assertions.issues: Blocked: No confirmed orders seeded in MOCK company. Cannot test dispatch preview, GST context, or shipment outcomes without seeded order data.

assertions.title: Dispatched orders surface the same invoice consistently across Sales and Accounting

steps.expected: Sales invoices page loads with invoice list
steps.observed: Sales invoices page loaded with 'No invoices yet' message
API call made correctly but returned empty data

steps.action: Login as accounting user and navigate to /accounting/invoices
steps.expected: Accounting invoices page loads with same invoice list
steps.observed: Accounting invoices page loaded with 'No invoices found' message

steps.action: Check network requests for accounting invoices
steps.observed: API call made correctly but returned empty data

evidence.network: GET /api/v1/invoices?size=100 (xhr) - same endpoint used by both Sales and Accounting portals

assertions.issues: Blocked: No invoices seeded in MOCK company. Cannot verify invoice consistency across Sales and Accounting portals without seeded dispatch/invoice data.

assertions.title: Returns only allow eligible invoices and block invalid quantities

steps.expected: Returns page loads with eligible invoices for return
steps.observed: Returns page loaded with 'No invoices available for return' message
API call made correctly but returned no dispatched/paid invoices

assertions.issues: Blocked: No dispatched or paid invoices seeded in MOCK company. Cannot test return eligibility view, return validation, or financial correction without seeded invoice data.

assertions.title: Dealer-facing O2C views stay dealer-scoped and internally consistent

steps.action: Login as dealer user and navigate to /dealer
steps.expected: Dealer dashboard loads with dealer-scoped data
steps.observed: Dealer dashboard loaded with all cards showing zero values
API call made correctly, returned dealer-scoped empty data

steps.expected: Dealer orders page loads with dealer-scoped orders
steps.observed: Dealer orders page loaded with 'No orders found'

steps.expected: Dealer invoices page loads with dealer-scoped invoices
steps.observed: Dealer invoices page loaded with 'No invoices found'

steps.expected: Dealer ledger page loads with dealer-scoped transactions
steps.observed: Dealer ledger page loaded with 'No transactions found'

steps.expected: Dealer aging page loads with dealer-scoped aging buckets
steps.observed: Dealer aging page loaded with all buckets showing ₹0

assertions.issues: Blocked: No dealer orders, invoices, or transactions seeded for validation.dealer@example.com in MOCK company. Cannot verify dealer-scoping consistency with empty data sets.

frictions.description: All four assertions require seeded O2C workflow data (confirmed orders, dispatched invoices, transactions) that does not exist in the MOCK company validation accounts

blockers.description: MOCK company validation accounts lack seeded O2C workflow data: no confirmed orders for dispatch testing, no dispatched/paid invoices for invoice consistency and returns testing, no dealer transactions for dealer-scoped view testing
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Verified all API endpoints are being called correctly and pages render empty states appropriately. The frontend correctly handles the empty data scenario.

blockers.description: Backend readiness for seeded validation data is tracked in ERP-15 per AGENTS.md

summary: Tested 4 assertions: 0 passed, 0 failed, 4 blocked. All assertions are blocked due to lack of seeded O2C workflow data (orders, invoices, transactions) in the MOCK company. The frontend correctly renders all pages and makes appropriate API calls to dealer-scoped endpoints (/api/v1/dealer-portal/*) and shared endpoints (/api/v1/invoices, /api/v1/sales/orders/search). Empty states are displayed appropriately. Requires backend seeding per ERP-15 before assertions can be validated.
